name: Transport
description_short: Transport Credit Union is a member-focused financial institution offering auto loans, mortgages, and deposit services with locations primarily in Florida.
description_long: Transport Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union serving members across multiple states, with physical locations and shared branch access. The organization was established to serve specific communities, with notable historical ties to UPS employees dating back to 1997, though membership has expanded beyond that original base. They position themselves as a member-centric alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing personalized service and community focus. The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans, motorcycle loans, boat loans, RV loans, personal loans, and mortgage services. Members have access to online and mobile banking platforms, including mobile deposit capabilities, and can utilize shared branching networks and ATM access through partnerships including Publix Presto ATMs. Their loan rates are competitive within the credit union space, with auto loans advertised from 5.24% APR and personal loans starting at 10.24% APR. The organization maintains multiple service channels including phone, email, and in-person banking at branch locations. Member testimonials highlight long-term relationships, personalized service from named staff members, and remote banking convenience for geographically dispersed members. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Transport operates on a member-owned cooperative model where members theoretically share in profits and governance. The company emphasizes accessibility features on their website and maintains standard credit union compliance with federal regulations.
services: Auto loans with rates from 5.24% APR
Motorcycle loans with rates from 7.24% APR
Boat loans with rates from 7.24% APR
RV loans with rates from 7.24% APR
Personal loans with rates from 10.24% APR
ATM network access including Publix Presto ATMs
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.24% APR, significantly lower than advertised personal loan rates
Full suite of vehicle financing options including auto, motorcycle, boat, and RV loans in one institution
Mobile banking with mobile deposit capability for remote account management
Shared branching network access beyond physical locations for multi-state accessibility
Mortgage services with flexible terms and in-house loan origination
Member testimonials document 20-30+ year relationships with same institution
Named personal financial advocates and relationship managers providing continuity of service
cons: Limited physical branch locations primarily concentrated in Florida, requiring remote banking for most members
Personal loan rates start at 10.24% APR, which is substantially higher than auto loan offerings and less competitive in the personal loan market
Website content does not clearly disclose membership eligibility criteria or field of membership restrictions typical of credit unions
No information provided about savings accounts, CD rates, or other deposit product terms
ATM/branch locator map interface requires active searching rather than displaying available locations upfront
best_for: UPS employees and their families seeking dedicated credit union services with established institutional relationships
Auto buyers and refinancers prioritizing competitive vehicle loan rates over diverse personal lending options
Multi-state members who need remote banking capabilities and value long-term personal relationships with loan officers
Borrowers seeking mortgage and vehicle financing from a single institution with personalized service model
diagnosis: Transport Credit Union is best for members with established credit union field-of-membership eligibility seeking competitive vehicle financing paired with personalized service. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted, branch access is geographically limited, and personal loan rates are less competitive than their auto lending products.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
